calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-24-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: S. Ravinantpapricha, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
John Mendonza, Esq. for Plaintiff: Redwood Credit Union.
Plaintiff's Witness John McLaughlin was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant(s): Samia Afra as follows:
Damages/Principal $27,394.57
Prejudgment interest $1,614.91
Attorney's Fees $932.50
Costs $415.00, for a total of $30,356.98
Judgment signed in open court.
